label: Type of Bill
plain: Four-digit code that says facility type, bill type, and frequency.

label: Statement Covers Period
plain: From and Through dates of the billing period.

label: Admission Date
plain: Date the patient was admitted (inpatient) or registered (outpatient).

label: Type of Admission/Visit
plain: Emergency, urgent, elective, newborn, trauma, etc.

label: Revenue Code
plain: Revenue code identifying the type of service charged.

label: HCPCS / Rates / HIPPS
plain: Procedure or rate code for the revenue line.

label: Total Charges
plain: Total charge for the line item.

label: Principal Diagnosis Code
plain: ICD-10-CM diagnosis chiefly responsible for admission.
